title: astragalus pauperculus
intro: Astragalus pauperculus, also known as low astragalus, is a perennial legume native to North America, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and delicate foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus pauperculus is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root powder, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
